mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_oper_log WHERE log_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_oper_log ORDER BY oper_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_oper_log WHERE oper_user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operUserName}, '%') ORDER BY oper_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_oper_log WHERE oper_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT oper_module FROM sys_oper_log ORDER BY oper_module
SELECT DISTINCT oper_type FROM sys_oper_log ORDER BY oper_type
